title: Passage from Hong Kong

actors: Lucile Fairbanks, Douglas Kennedy, Paul Cavanagh
plot: Set in Hong Kong on the eve of the Japanese invasion and a version of "The Second Floor Mystery (1930)", Jeff Hunter (Douglas Kennedy), a writer of pulp thrillers, tries to woo a reluctant Maria Calhoun (Lucille Fairbanks) by inve...
